description: Move file processing from request-time to background worker loses progress feedback
diff_summary: Changed CSV import from synchronous processing to async Celery background task

edge_cases: No endpoint to check job status or retrieve results — frontend gets job_id but nowhere to poll; temp file may be deleted before worker processes it if cleanup runs first
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Async job requires a status endpoint (/import/status/{job_id}) and result storage — neither implemented; the API contract changed from synchronous result to async job without frontend coordination
ground_truth.next_prompt: How do I check if the import finished? The response only gives me a job_id but there's no status endpoint
ground_truth.notes: Async migration requires building status/result retrieval — half-implemented here
